summary: Re-linked the fighter walk common module from C instead of assembly. The PR deleted the 455-line asm fallback `asm/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.s`, changed `configure.py` from `Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c")` to `Object(Matching, "melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c")`, and updated `obj_files.mk` to build `src/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c.o` instead of `asm/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.s.o`.

key_files.role: Deleted asm fallback for ftwalkcommon after the C object was promoted to matching.
Changed `melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c` object classification from NonMatching to Matching.

what_changed: Removed `asm/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.s`, which contained assembly for `ftWalkCommon_GetWalkType`, `ftWalkCommon_800DFC70`, `ftWalkCommon_800DFCA4`, `ftWalkCommon_800DFDDC`, `ftWalkCommon_800DFEC8`, and `ftWalkCommon_800E0060`.
Updated `obj_files.mk` so the build uses the C object under `src/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c.o` rather than the asm object under `asm/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.s.o`.
smart_moves: Kept the relink narrowly scoped: only the asm fallback and the two build/link declarations changed.
Updated both build declarations that matter in this repository slice, avoiding a half-relink where `configure.py` and `obj_files.mk` disagree.
Deleted the old asm fallback instead of leaving duplicate dead assembly for an already matching C module.
decomp_lessons: For a completed matching module, the final cleanup is not only marking the C file `Matching`; the object list must also be switched from `asm/...s.o` to `src/...c.o`.
A clean relink PR can be very small when prior C work already matches: one object classification change, one object path change, and deletion of the old asm file.
Removing the asm file makes future regressions easier to spot because the build can no longer silently depend on the fallback assembly for this module.
naming_conventions: Exported symbols in the deleted asm use the `ftWalkCommon_` prefix, including the named helper `ftWalkCommon_GetWalkType` and address-suffixed placeholders such as `ftWalkCommon_800DFCA4`.
Build configuration refers to source paths as `melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c` inside `Object(...)` declarations.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Relink tactic: replace `Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c")` with `Object(Matching, "melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c")` once the C object is link-compatible.

Deleted asm covered walk-type thresholds, walk motion state changes, animation-rate updates, ground-friction handling, and walk velocity/friction helpers, but the PR does not show the C implementation changes that made it match.
follow_up_queries: Find the PR or commit that made `src/melee/ft/ftwalkcommon.c` match before this relink.
Check nearby fighter common modules still linked from `asm/melee/ft/*.s.o` for similar relink opportunities.
Search for remaining `Object(NonMatching, "melee/ft/...")` entries that may only need object-list cleanup.
